report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: DeFi Lending Protocol Comparison 2026 (Aave V4, Morpho Blue, Compound V3, Fluid, Spark) and DeFi Yield Aggregators Guide 2026 (Yearn, Beefy, Pendle, Sommelier). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO metadata and structured data.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DeFi Lending Market: $45B+ TVL in lending protocols. Aave dominates at $40B+ TVL with $1T cumulative loans. Aave V4 governance vote passed March 24, 2026 with 100% support — introducing hub-and-spoke unified liquidity architecture (Core/Prime/Plus hubs), deeper GHO integration, 345-day security review with $1.5M audit budget. Morpho Blue at $5.8B TVL (down from $10B+ peak) with Apollo Global partnership (90M MORPHO tokens over 48 months). Morpho V2 moving to market-driven rate pricing. Fluid at $1.9B TVL, merging lending + DEX into unified liquidity — Smart Collateral/Smart Debt earn trading fees while posted as margin, LTVs up to 95%, became 2nd largest DEX on Ethereum. Compound V3 remains battle-tested but conservative.

DeFi Yield Aggregators: $1.7B sector TVL. Yearn Finance at $1B+ TVL, V3 modular architecture with strategist-driven vaults, stables 2-8% APY. Beefy Finance at $316M TVL across 38+ chains with 1,500+ vault strategies, auto-compounding via keeper networks. Pendle Finance at $5B+ TVL, pioneered yield tokenization (PT/YT split), replaced vePENDLE with sPENDLE in Jan 2026, Ethena USDe is ~70% of TVL. Sommelier offers institutional-grade regulated vault management.
Both topics identified as genuine content gaps — no existing dedicated comparison guide for lending protocols or yield aggregators despite these being core DeFi categories with high search volume.

sections.title: Content Created
items: DeFi Lending Protocol Comparison 2026: ~3200 words, 12 min read, 11 sections + 6 FAQs. Covers Aave V4 (hub-and-spoke, GHO), Morpho Blue (modular isolation, Apollo partnership), Compound V3 (battle-tested veteran), Fluid (unified lending+DEX, Smart Collateral), Spark (MakerDAO ecosystem). Side-by-side comparison table, decision framework, risk analysis.

DeFi Yield Aggregators Guide 2026: ~3000 words, 11 min read, 10 sections + 6 FAQs. Covers how auto-compounding works, Yearn Finance (strategist vaults), Beefy Finance (multi-chain king), Pendle Finance (yield tokenization), Sommelier (institutional). Comparison table, choosing guide, risk considerations.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Lending Comparison: Title 'DeFi Lending Protocol Comparison 2026: Aave vs Morpho vs Compound vs Fluid | degen0x', target keyword 'defi lending comparison 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs, 5 internal links (DeFi safety guide, flash loans, stablecoin yields, lending comparison tool, Morpho deep dive)

Yield Aggregators: Title 'DeFi Yield Aggregators Guide 2026: Yearn, Beefy, Pendle & Auto-Compounding | degen0x', target keyword 'defi yield aggregator 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs, 5 internal links (DeFi safety guide, DeFi yields tool, stablecoin yield strategies, Pendle guide, impermanent loss)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for next daily rollout

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: 0 new errors from new pages (all errors are pre-existing @types/web conflicts in node_modules)
Fixed 2 syntax issues in yield aggregators page: extra closing brace in style prop, combineSchemas called with array argument
Both pages match established template pattern (Metadata, StructuredData, Breadcrumb, BackToTop, dark theme, TOC, comparison tables, callouts, FAQ schema)
